creator: wollman@khavrinen.lcs.mit.edu
text:

> Synopsis: -current machine running Diablo, lockup, possible inode deadlock

> State-Changed-When: Thu Aug 13 23:12:26 PDT 1998
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Any change after the "rename" softupdate bugfix ?

As I mentioned in my previous reply, this hang is NOT
softupdates-related.

-GAWollman
